description_long: This hammer features a robust, futuristic design with a thick, cylindrical handle and a large, symmetrical head. The head is composed of two broad, angular striking faces, each highlighted by translucent green panels set within a black and metallic frame. The central section of the head is hexagonal, with green accents and geometric detailing, giving it a high-tech appearance. The handle is straight, black, and appears to have a textured grip at the base for secure handling. The overall construction suggests a heavy-duty tool, possibly for demolition or specialized urban tasks. The color scheme of black, metallic gray, and vibrant green makes it visually striking and easily identifiable.
description: A heavy-duty, futuristic hammer with a black and green color scheme, featuring a thick, textured handle and a large, angular head with translucent green panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the hammer's head, with both green panels and the central hexagonal section clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the hammer's head and the thickness of the handle, with one green panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical design and both green panels on the head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and one green panel.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle with a textured, rubberized grip at the base, primarily black in color.
attribute_head_type: Large, symmetrical sledge-type head with two broad, angular striking faces and translucent green panels set in a metallic frame.
